question: Why did our regional-bank holdings underperform yesterday relative to the macro CPI print?
metric_label: Regional-bank macro attribution by holding, daily

upstream_models.description: Daily position book from 13F and internal trade records. Includes ticker, sector classification, position size in USD, and weight in the book.
FRED macro series at daily grain. Includes CPIAUCSL, DGS10, FEDFUNDS, UNRATE. Joined on observation_date to isolate the CPI surprise day.
Issuer master with SIC code, sector, and regional-bank flag (SIC 6020–6029). Maps holdings to the regional-bank sub-universe for filtering.
CFPB consumer complaints at institution level. Used to derive complaint-sentiment ratio per issuer — a leading indicator of fundamental gap vs. market price gap.
